category_sources: source_facts.description identifies tcsh as an enhanced compatible Berkeley C shell; official site describes it as a C shell with completion and command-line editing.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name gives tcsh; current_curation.display-name also gives tcsh.
docs_sources: Official tcsh site links to the FAQ under User guides and to the official source code repository.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official tcsh.org Developer resources links to the tcsh-org GitHub source code repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says enhanced Berkeley C shell; official site describes file name completion and command-line editing.
